name: limitless-subgraphs
description: Subgraphs for Limitless prediction market on Base

scripts.codegen: npm run codegen:simple && npm run codegen:negrisk
scripts.build:simple: cd packages/simple-markets && graph codegen && graph build
scripts.build:negrisk: cd packages/negrisk-markets && graph codegen && graph build
scripts.build: npm run build:simple && npm run build:negrisk
scripts.deploy:simple: cd packages/simple-markets && graph deploy --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ limitless-simple-markets
scripts.deploy:negrisk: cd packages/negrisk-markets && graph deploy --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ limitless-negrisk-markets
scripts.create:simple: cd packages/simple-markets && graph create --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ limitless-simple-markets
scripts.create:negrisk: cd packages/negrisk-markets && graph create --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ limitless-negrisk-markets
